name: Upgrade Safety Verification Grimoire
description: Expert procedure for verifying upgrade-related vulnerabilities. Tests for uninitialized proxies, storage slot collisions, implementation takeover, and unsafe delegatecall patterns.
author: VKG Team
graph_queries: FIND functions WHERE is_initializer = true AND visibility IN [public, external]

steps.name: Identify Proxy Pattern
steps.description: Query VKG for proxy and upgrade indicators

steps.name: Check Initialization
steps.description: Verify proxy is properly initialized and initializer is protected

steps.name: Analyze Storage Layout
steps.description: Check for storage slot collisions between proxy and implementation

steps.name: Check Implementation Security
steps.description: Verify implementation cannot be destroyed or taken over

verdict_rules.explanation: Proxy initializer can be called by anyone - implementation takeover possible
Implementation can be destroyed, bricking the proxy
Storage slot collision detected between proxy and implementation
Delegatecall to unvalidated address - arbitrary code execution risk
Initializer can be called multiple times
